text: I feel a spark of curiosity as I wander through this modern, almost futuristic exhibition space. The prominent theme of R + D—research and development—draws my thoughts toward the endless dialogue between humans and technology. Surrounded by glass, digital screens, and bold colors, I sense a playful tension between the known and the possible. It makes me ponder my place within these evolving narratives, and I feel both inspired by innovation and humbled by all that remains unknown.
